Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include at least one rejection loop
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and a subsequent Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in re-submitted cases

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the case reaches the supervisor approval stage
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to the total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants where the budget owner was not involved
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that eventually lead to Payment Handled versus those that terminate in rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in 2017 versus 2018 cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in multi-approver variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR versus when directly following an approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from initial Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to final Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants with multiple rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'
